subject: Ampharos, a tall yellow sheep-like creature in a sunny outdoor setting
description: A tall, upright yellow sheep-like creature stands in a bright outdoor setting. The figure has a round head, a glowing red orb at the tip of its tail, black ring markings on its ears and tail, and a sturdy bipedal body. It appears to be in a relaxed or peaceful pose, standing beside what appears to be a leafy tree or bush. The background is bright with warm afternoon light filtering through foliage. The palette is warm yellows, greens, and natural daylight tones.
foreground: tall upright yellow sheep-creature with red orb on tail, standing near foliage
background: sunny outdoor setting with leafy trees and bright warm light
